channel.title: state on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in state on IT notes

item.title: Merge Terraform States
item.description: If states are being stored in S3, after importing a resource, for example: $ terraform import aws_customer_gateway.main cgw-b4dc3961 You will end with a terraform.tfstate that differs from the one in the S3 bucket. To merge the remote and local state do this: $ terraform state pull > terraform.tfstate $ terraform import aws_customer_gateway.main cgw-b4dc3961 $ terraform state push terraform.tfstate First get the current s3 state: $ terraform state pull > terraform.
